overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game showing a character walking along a waterfront promenade beneath an elevated highway. The scene transitions from an urban underpass area with modern glass architecture to a harbor walkway with metal railings, ending with the character drawing a weapon. Warm golden hour lighting illuminates the cyberpunk-inspired cityscape.

agents.ego_description: moving forward along the concrete walkway beneath the elevated highway, approaching the stairwell entrance

massive concrete highway structure overhead with support pillars
tall modern building with green-tinted glass facade and digital signage
multi-story contemporary building with geometric architecture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view approaching a concrete stairwell entrance beneath an elevated highway. The camera moves forward along the walkway, passing under the massive concrete overpass structure with a distinctive green glass building visible in the distance to the left.

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person following a character in a yellow cap walking beneath the elevated highway. The camera continues along the concrete walkway as vehicles pass on the adjacent road, with the green glass building receding into the distance and modern office architecture dominating the right side.

events.description: walkway opens to waterfront with metal railings and harbor water visible to the left
character draws a weapon and assumes a combat stance while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: character transitions from walking to running along the waterfront, then draws a weapon and aims forward

notable_agents.action: character running along waterfront promenade then drawing a handgun and aiming

entered.detail: rusted metal safety railings with horizontal bars separating walkway from water
calm harbor water with wooden dock structures and cranes visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open waterfront promenade with metal railings overlooking the harbor. The character jogs along the walkway with water and docks visible to the left, then draws a weapon and assumes a combat stance while continuing forward under the receding overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous movement from a confined urban underpass that gradually opens into a wide waterfront promenade. It begins from a first-person perspective approaching a concrete stairwell beneath a massive elevated highway, with a distinctive green glass building visible in the distance. As the camera shifts to a third-person view, it follows a character in a yellow cap walking along the concrete walkway past passing vehicles and modern office architecture. The scene then expands as the character emerges onto an open harbor walkway with metal railings and docks to the left. Finally, the character begins to jog forward under the receding overpass before drawing a weapon and assuming a combat stance.
